channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 21 Jun: Harare light drizzle · high 19° / low 9°
item.description: Harare: high 19°, low 9° (light drizzle) · Bulawayo: high 19°, low 12° (light drizzle) · Mutare: high 16°, low 12° (drizzle) · Gweru: high 17°, low 10° (light drizzle) · Masvingo: high 16°, low 11° (light drizzle) · Victoria Falls: high 24°, low 12° (overcast) Tsumo yezuva: Charova sei chando chakwidza hamba mumuti. (Extreme situations make people behave in unusual ways.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
